We changed the 'replay production' so we need to deploy a new version for mydsstats (PWA app), dsstats.maui (MAUI app) and the dsstats.service (Windows service)
We have a deploy script for mydsstats on the server, so this should not be a problem
The deploy script for the service (src\service\deploy.ps1) should also work (we need to make sure we increse the version)
For maui we manually upload the result of src\maui\build.ps1, but we also have to make sure to encrese the version
